## 1.0.1

- 修复含 .nomedia 的文件夹中视频无法切换上下集的问题
- 修复视频自动方向检测失效，现在能正确识别横竖屏
- 长按文件夹时新增「排除」操作，可快速排除不需要的文件夹
- 关于页面新增检查更新功能，支持手动检查和打开时自动检查
- 最低系统版本下调至 Android 10

<details>
<summary>English Version</summary>

- Fixed prev/next buttons not working for videos in .nomedia folders
- Fixed video orientation auto-detection, now correctly switches to landscape or portrait
- Added exclude action when long-pressing folders for quick folder exclusion
- Added update check in about page with manual and auto-check on open
- Lowered minimum Android version to Android 10

</details>
